hooks.command: echo 'Running pre-commit tests...' && cd build/OAuth2Server && ctest --output-on-failure && echo 'Tests passed, commit allowed' || (echo 'Tests failed, commit blocked' && exit 1)
echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -Eq 'models/.*\.(h|cc|cpp)$' && echo 'BLOCKED: ORM models must be regenerated via drogon_ctl (see /orm-gen skill).' && exit 1 || exit 0
echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -Eq 'config\.prod\.json$' && echo 'BLOCKED: config.prod.json contains production settings. Use environment variables.' && exit 1 || exit 0

FILE_PATH=$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH; if echo $FILE_PATH | grep -qE '\.(cc|h|cpp|hpp|json)$'; then if grep -q 'TODO.*REPLACE.*CREDENTIAL' $FILE_PATH 2>/dev/null; then echo 'BLOCKED: File contains placeholder credentials. Replace with environment variables.'; exit 1; fi; fi; exit 0
